slides.title: The Problem
slides.speakerNotes: Everyone hates making PowerPoints manually. It takes hours for a decent deck.

slides.title: Death by PowerPoint
slides.leftContent:
• Open PowerPoint
• Stare at blank slide
• Fight with formatting
• Copy-paste charts manually
• Source stock photos
• 3 hours later: mediocre deck
slides.rightContent:
• Send JSON to an API
• AI generates images
• Charts rendered from data
• Brand-consistent styling
• Professional output in seconds
• Never touch a GUI

slides.title: HoloDex at a Glance
slides.body:
HoloDex is a programmatic presentation engine that generates professional PowerPoint files from structured JSON.

It supports 22 slide types, 10 color palettes, brand management, AI image generation, charts, icons, and speaker notes — all without touching a GUI.

Built with TypeScript, PptxGenJS, and the Model Context Protocol (MCP).
slides.speakerNotes: Think of it as an API for PowerPoint. You describe what you want, HoloDex builds it.

slides.title: System Architecture
slides.body:
HoloDex runs as a dual-protocol server:

• REST API on port 3000 for direct integration
• MCP StreamableHTTP at /mcp for AI agent access
• Express middleware handles routing and validation
• PptxGenJS engine renders slides from typed schemas
• Azure OpenAI generates images via Entra ID auth

aiImage.prompt: Clean system architecture diagram style illustration showing interconnected modules: API layer, engine core, AI image service, and MCP protocol, dark blue tech aesthetic with glowing connection lines

items.description: Title, content, charts, tables, timelines, and more

items.description: Upload logos, colors, fonts — reuse across decks

items.title: AI Images

items.title: Live Charts
items.description: Bar, line, pie, doughnut from raw data

slides.title: Slide Type Usage Distribution
slides.speakerNotes: Content and two-column slides are the most commonly used. Charts and images follow closely.

slides.title: Three Auth Options
slides.leftContent:
1. OpenAI Direct
   DALL-E 3 or GPT-image-1

2. Azure OpenAI + API Key
   Standard key authentication

3. Azure OpenAI + Entra ID
   DefaultAzureCredential
   No API key required
slides.rightContent:
• Add aiImage field to any slide
• Engine auto-detects and generates
• Images cached for batch efficiency
• Graceful fallback to placeholder
• Theme-aware prompt refinement
• Supports 1024x1024 to 1792x1024

slides.title: AI-Generated Imagery
slides.body:
Every image in this deck was generated by DALL-E 3 running on Azure OpenAI, authenticated via Entra ID with DefaultAzureCredential.

No API keys were used — just az login and the Cognitive Services OpenAI User RBAC role.

aiImage.prompt: Abstract neural network visualization with flowing data streams in deep blue and purple, professional presentation style, dark background with luminous particles

slides.title: MCP Tools Reference
rows: Generate a full PPTX from JSON

slides.title: Agent365 — The Bridge
slides.body:
Agent365 is a unified MCP gateway that connects AI agents to multiple tool servers through a single StreamableHTTP endpoint.

HoloDex is registered as mcp_HoloDex in the Agent365 manifest, making it accessible to any MCP-compatible agent including GitHub Copilot, Copilot Studio, and Claude.

The transport uses StreamableHTTP at /mcp — no stdio piping required.

slides.title: Copilot Studio Integration
slides.body:
HoloDex works with Microsoft Copilot Studio via the returnUrl pattern:

1. Agent calls create_presentation with a returnUrl
2. HoloDex generates the PPTX and stores it
3. Returns a download URL valid for 1 hour
4. Agent presents the link to the user

This avoids base64 transfer limits in conversational AI.

slides.title: Philosophy
slides.quote: The best presentation tool is the one you never have to open.
